description: The commercial thriller / suspense contract: a competent protagonist in over their head, escalating stakes, and a ticking clock — driven by extremely short chapters, relentless cliffhangers, multi-threaded POV, and utilitarian prose. A startling hook, a concealed world to decode, a midpoint twist, and order pulled out of chaos by the end. Tuned for 70k–100k-word page-turners.
